== Notes for [[Item:Q103082|Q103082]] ==

* Reference: [https://www.myheritage.com/research/record-1-121390991-2-502985/myheritage-family-trees?indId=externalindividual-176a6410ec1721c74439424fab83a377&mrid=579c34af50c715a477aaa6eaeda879b4 MyHeritage Family Trees] - [http://www.geni.com/projects/SmartCopy/18783 SmartCopy]: ''Jan 17 2017, 11:37:47 UTC''

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000052930108927

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
